message:
✨ Add DLNA/UPnP screen casting support (#29)

- Add cast_service.dart: DLNA device discovery, casting, playback control
- Add cast_dialog.dart: Device picker dialog with scan/stop/device icons
- Add cast button to player screen overlay controls
- Add cast button to channels screen top bar (amber when active)
- Add dlna_dart dependency for UPnP/SSDP protocol support

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -297,6 +297,14 @@ packages:
       url: "https://pub.dev"
     source: hosted
     version: "2.1.1"
+  dlna_dart:
+    dependency: "direct main"
+    description:
+      name: dlna_dart
+      sha256: "8a4f0e4f378615c99f2af679dc9f0c72fe4a0fb2f3eea96b637fe691dfcf0649"
+      url: "https://pub.dev"
+    source: hosted
+    version: "0.1.0"
   drift:
     dependency: "direct main"
     description:

@@ -57,6 +57,7 @@ dependencies:
   cached_network_image: ^3.4.1
   shimmer: ^3.0.0
   flutter_staggered_grid_view: ^0.7.0
+  dlna_dart: ^0.1.0
 
 dev_dependencies:
   flutter_test:
